In this chapter:

(1) “Commission” means the Railroad Commission of Texas.

(2) “Structure” means a combination bridge, dam, dike, or causeway.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 341. Private Causeways
##### § 341.001 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Commission” means the Railroad Commission of Texas.

    (2) “Structure” means a combination bridge, dam, dike, or causeway.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: “Commission” means the Railroad Commission of Texas.
“Structure” means a combination bridge, dam, dike, or causeway.
